task_completion.description: Verify that a location named 'Main Auditorium' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Main Auditorium' in the Locations list page or visible as an option in location dropdown menus.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 7 target AV assets are checked out to the 'Main Auditorium' location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list or the 'Main Auditorium' location details page. The assets AV-PROJ-01, AV-PROJ-02, AV-MIC-01, AV-MIC-02, AV-MIC-03, AV-MIC-04, and AV-SW-01 should show as checked out or deployed to 'Main Auditorium'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the expected checkin date for the checked-out assets is set to '2026-03-16'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset list, checkout confirmation, or asset details page. The 'Expected Checkin' date for the target assets should be '2026-03-16'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the note 'Global Tech Symposium' is included in the checkout details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the asset history, checkout confirmation, or asset details page. The note 'Global Tech Symposium' should be visible for the target assets' checkout records.

task_completion.description: Verify that unrelated assets were not modified or checked out.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Hardware/Assets list. Assets like AV-PROJ-03 and AV-MIC-05 should still have a status of 'Ready to Deploy' and should not be checked out to any location.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web-based asset management system (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the actual asset management software interface, not a text editor, script file, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation or backend scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running SQL commands, curl requests, or python scripts to bypass the UI.
